module.name: StaticContentSample
module.param: This dashboard provides Windows PerfMon information regarding Physical Disk across your virtual desktops. You can filter this view by entering values in the fields below and pressing enter. Selecting a hostname from the table will take you to a detailed Logical Disk utilization report for that desktop. For detailed views on other counters look under Reports/Environment in the navigation above. To view the entire result set for this report or manipulate the data further, click View Full Report.

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `vdihosts` `perfmon_physdisk` object=PhysicalDisk $vm_name$ | `perfmon_desktop_lookup`| search * $catalog_name$ $HostingServerName$ | stats last(Value) as Value by counter vm_name _time

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: stats dc(vm_name) as vm | eval range="vmsreporting"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Split IO/Sec" | stats max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min by vm_name | head 10 | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Split IO/Sec" | rename max as "Max Split IO/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Split IO/Sec"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `perfmon_process` $vm_name$ | table vm_name Value counter instance process_name | eval mem = if(counter=="Virtual Bytes",Value,"") | eval cpu = if(counter=="% Processor Time",Value,"") | eval ioread = if(counter="IO Read Operations/sec",Value,"") | eval iowrite = if(counter="IO Write Operations/sec",Value,"")

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Split IO/Sec" | timechart max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Split IO/Sec" | rename max as "Max Split IO/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Split IO/Sec"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Transfers/Sec" | stats max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min by vm_name | head 10 | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Transfers/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Transfers/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Disk Transfers/Sec"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `perfmon_process` $vm_name$ | table vm_name Value counter instance process_name | eval mem = if(counter=="Virtual Bytes",Value,"") | eval cpu = if(counter=="% Processor Time",Value,"") | eval ioread = if(counter="IO Read Operations/sec",Value,"") | eval iowrite = if(counter="IO Write Operations/sec",Value,"")

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Transfers/Sec" | timechart max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Transfers/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Transfers/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Disk Transfers/Sec"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Bytes/Sec" | stats max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min by vm_name | head 10 | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Bytes/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Bytes/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Disk Bytes/Sec"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `perfmon_process` $vm_name$ | table vm_name Value counter instance process_name | eval mem = if(counter=="Virtual Bytes",Value,"") | eval cpu = if(counter=="% Processor Time",Value,"") | eval ioread = if(counter="IO Read Operations/sec",Value,"") | eval iowrite = if(counter="IO Write Operations/sec",Value,"")

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Bytes/Sec" | timechart max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Bytes/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Bytes/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Disk Bytes/Sec"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Reads/Sec" | stats max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min by vm_name | head 10 | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Reads/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Reads/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Disk Reads/Sec"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `perfmon_process` $vm_name$ | table vm_name Value counter instance process_name| eval mem = if(counter=="Virtual Bytes",Value,"") | eval cpu = if(counter=="% Processor Time",Value,"") | eval ioread = if(counter="IO Read Operations/sec",Value,"") | eval iowrite = if(counter="IO Write Operations/sec",Value,"")

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Reads/Sec" | timechart max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Reads/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Reads/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Disk Reads/Sec"

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Writes/Sec" | stats max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min by vm_name | head 10 | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Writes/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Writes/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg. Disk Writes/Sec"

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: `perfmon_process` $vm_name$ | table vm_name Value counter instance process_name | eval mem = if(counter=="Virtual Bytes",Value,"") | eval cpu = if(counter=="% Processor Time",Value,"") | eval ioread = if(counter="IO Read Operations/sec",Value,"") | eval iowrite = if(counter="IO Write Operations/sec",Value,"")

module.name: HiddenPostProcess
module.param: | search counter="Disk Writes/Sec" | timechart max(Value) as max avg(Value) as avg min(Value) as min | eval avg = round(avg,2) | eval max = round(max,2) | eval min = round(min,2) | rename min as "Min Disk Writes/Sec" | rename max as "Max Disk Writes/Sec" | rename avg as "Avg Disk Writes/Sec"
